hooks.command: MSG=$(jq -r '.message // "Claude Code is done"'); printf '\a' > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "$MSG" -sound Glass 2>/dev/null || true
MSG=$(jq -r '.message // "Claude Code needs permission"'); printf '\a' > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "$MSG" -sound Ping 2>/dev/null || true
